title: so much stuff!
description:
adds a bunch of stuff to Minecraft, including emerald armour and tools fireflies
and many more
body:
This mod significantly enhances your Minecraft experience by introducing a wide array of new features, including:  

- **Emerald Armor and Tools**: Craft powerful armor and tools using emeralds, providing better protection and durability compared to standard options.  
- **Additional Armor Sets**: Discover new types of armor that offer unique benefits and styles, catering to various play styles.  
- **More Tools**: Utilize an expanded selection of tools that improve efficiency in mining, building, and combat.  
- **2 New Mob**: 2 new exciting mobs that add fresh challenges and interactions to your gameplay.  
- **A New Dimension**: Explore a completely new dimension filled with unique landscapes, resources, and secrets waiting to be uncovered.  
- **2 New Potions**: Brew 2 new potion that grants special abilities, enhancing your survival strategy and adventure.  
- **a new boss**: that brings an exciting blend of challenging yet enjoyable gameplay.
- **And So Much More**: Enjoy a plethora of additional features and enhancements that bring diversity and excitement to your Minecraft world.  

Dive in and discover how these additions can transform your gameplay!
